go.implementation: 9x9 simplified go rules, no ko tracking, heuristic + shallow random rollouts
go.scoring: simple stone + surrounded-empty area estimate, no komi

reversi.implementation: hand-written Reversi legal move + alpha-beta search

experiment.implementation: alpha-beta search with SQLite learning bias

experiment 3:dl.implementation: JSON neural/policy style evaluator plus search fallback

experiment 4:pv.implementation: policy/value model, MCTS option, guarded overlay when enabled

experiment 5:nnue.implementation: NNUE-like sparse evaluator + alpha-beta/PVS style search

chess.hard: static opening book first, then one-ply opponent reply penalty
chess.normal: static opening book first, then material/check heuristic
chess.opening_book: route layer consults chess_opening_book for every non-easy difficulty; UI does not expose chess easy
